search.query: source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ userfullname=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | stats count by userfullname | stats count

panel.title: Total email addresses in $selectedsourcetype$ over time

search.query: source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ username=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | bin _time span=1d |stats count by username, _time | timechart span=1d count

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ userfullname=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | bin _time span=1d | eval MARKER = if (_time < relative_time(now(), "@mon"), "DISAPPEARED","NEW") | dedup userfullname | eventstats count AS FOUND by userfullname | table userfullname, MARKER, FOUND | search MARKER=NEW AND FOUND=1 | fields userfullname

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ userfullname=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | bin _time span=1d | eval MARKER = if (_time < relative_time(now(), "@mon"), "DISAPPEARED","NEW") | dedup userfullname | eventstats count AS FOUND by userfullname | table userfullname, MARKER, FOUND | search MARKER=DISAPPEARED AND FOUND=1 | fields userfullname, MARKER

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ AND userfullname=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | timechart count span=1d

source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ userfullname=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | stats count by userfullname

panel.title: Number of unique users per day - $selectedsourcetype$

search.query: source=fpins ppcode=SSE type=$selectedsourcetype$ userfullname=* | search [| makeresults | eval filter=if("$selectedsourcetype$"="DLP","proxytype!=SWG","") | return $filter] | bin _time span=1d | stats count by userfullname ,_time | timechart count span=1d
